text: The surgeon points out the terminal ileum (TI) during the anatomical orientation.
The terminal ileum is shown entering the cecum, with the right colon visibly mobilized.
The surgeon has taken down a very proximal transverse end colostomy, with the surgical field elevated for better visualization.
The surgeon performs a counterclockwise rotation to deliver the soma down to the pelvis in preparation for a colorectal anastomosis.
